name: Zucchini Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and honey until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the margarine mixture, alternating with additions of grated zucchini.
5. Stir in the oats and dates or raisins.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Created by: Leigh Hinkelman, USC Medical Center
